subcodes.first_line: We extend greetings to the friends of God and impart the Glad Tidings from the Ocean of His Bounty
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوستان الهی را تکبیر میرسانیم و ببحر عنایت حق جل جلاله بشارت میدهیم ای اهل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @martyrs and martyrdom
